description.zh: 这是千岛湖的一段航拍。它使用了一非常高且独特的视角俯瞰千岛湖。站得高看得远，在高处拍摄的千岛湖和坐在船上看到的很不一样。
description.en: This is an aerial photo of Qiandao Lake. It uses a very high and unique perspective to overlook Qiandao Lake. Standing high and looking far, the Qiandao Lake captured from a height is very different from what you see while sitting on a boat.

description.zh: 这是一个位于杭州市千岛湖景区的网红小灯塔。在落日时间会非常美丽、浪漫。
description.en: This is a popular small lighthouse located in Qiandao Lake Scenic Area, Hangzhou. It will be very beautiful and romantic during sunset time.

description.zh: 这段视频是在瑞士的瑞吉山拍摄的，从山坡到断崖，下方就是城市是瑞吉山独有的壮观景色。
description.en: This video was filmed on Mount Riji, where from the slopes to the cliffs, the city below is a spectacular scenery unique to Riji Mountain.

description.zh: 这段视频拍摄于贵州龙里大桥，这个桥是世界首座车行道与玻璃步道共桥面的高山峡谷景观桥‌，非常震撼、壮观。
description.en: This video was filmed on the Longli Bridge in Guizhou, which is the world's first high mountain canyon landscape bridge with a shared roadway and glass walkway. It is very stunning and spectacular.

description.zh: 这是在2024年位于贵州贵阳市拍摄的一段视频。拍摄出了出了贵州乡村的自然风光。
description.en: This is a video filmed in Guiyang, Guizhou in 2024. We captured the natural scenery of rural Guizhou.

description.zh: 这是在京郊拍摄的一段视频，站在平地上，看不出来这里的景色，只有飞到高空，才能发现稻田、湖泊、小岛组合出来的景色。
description.en: This is a video shot in the suburbs of Beijing. Standing on flat ground, you can't see the scenery here. Only by flying high in the sky can you discover the combination of rice fields, lakes, and small islands.
